original_image_tags: Black-and-white newspaper photograph of a man in a clerical collar (Father Joseph Brasky) holding a large circular saw. An arrow drawn on the photo points to a church lightning rod in the background.
Bottom right corner of the document shows handwritten and stamped markings.

elements.description: One black-and-white photograph within a newspaper clipping. It depicts one man (Father Joseph Brasky) holding a circular saw. A graphical arrow points from the saw toward the top of a lightning rod in the background. Below the image is a caption describing the event as a 'flying disc' joke involving a circular saw.

judge.reason: Both agree on a black-and-white photograph of Father Joseph Brasky holding a circular saw with an arrow pointing to a lightning rod; A mentions handwritten/stamped markings in the bottom right corner which B omits, but they do not contradict on any specific quoted text.
